description: Curated, editable starter presets for useful MCP servers. Presets are data, not hardcoded Rust behavior; add or override catalogs through mcpace.config.json mcpPresets.includePaths or MCPACE_MCP_PRESETS.

presets.title: Filesystem access for the current project
presets.description: Runs the filesystem MCP server through npx and grants access only to selected paths.
notes: Only grant paths you are comfortable exposing to an MCP client.
If no --path is passed, MCPace uses the project root.
Matches the MCP Inspector stdio example shape: npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem <path>.

review.summary: Project-root scoped filesystem server; serialize writers per project/root and audit tools before unattended calls.

presets.title: Current developer documentation with Context7
presets.description: Runs the Context7 MCP server through npx for library/API documentation lookup during coding tasks.
notes: Useful for coding assistants that need current library documentation.
Review network and API-key behavior before enabling in restricted workspaces.
For higher limits, pass supported credentials with --env or use a remote Context7 setup directly in a client.

review.summary: Documentation lookup is a multi-reader candidate, but network/API-key behavior stays explicit.

presets.title: Git repository context
presets.description: Runs mcp-server-git through uvx and scopes it to one repository path.
notes: If no --path is passed, MCPace uses the project root as the repository.

review.summary: Git state is repo/worktree-bound; allow parallel reads only after explicit tool audit.

presets.title: Browser automation through Playwright MCP
presets.description: Runs the official Playwright MCP package through npx so a client can inspect and interact with web pages.
notes: Browser automation can interact with websites and should be enabled only for trusted workflows.
Pass extra Playwright flags after the preset with --arg, for example --arg --headless.
Review the server package before running it.

review.summary: Browser automation controls live pages and profiles; single active session per profile until isolation is proven.

starter.name: developer-local
starter.description: Small conservative starter pack for a local developer workspace.
